'''Troa'shak''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] member of the [[Clan Shak|Shak clan]] and was the brother of [[Koh'shak]], [[Elam'shak]] and [[Wrou'shak]]. He served as the [[Water Keeper]] at the [[Kala'uun Starport]].

{{Char-stub}}
